public_sources.title: Northstar expands its regional fulfillment network
public_sources.raw_text: Northstar Logistics opened two regional fulfillment centers in June 2026. The centers add temperature-controlled capacity for healthcare shipments. Northstar also named Maya Chen vice president of network operations.

public_sources.title: Northstar introduces healthcare lane planning sessions
public_sources.raw_text: Northstar will offer healthcare shippers a quarterly lane planning session beginning in August 2026. The session will review capacity forecasts and exception trends with customer operations teams.

proposed_excerpts.quote: Northstar Logistics opened two regional fulfillment centers in June 2026.
Northstar also named Maya Chen vice president of network operations.
Northstar will offer healthcare shippers a quarterly lane planning session beginning in August 2026.

proposed_claims.text: Northstar Logistics opened two regional fulfillment centers in June 2026.
Maya Chen is Northstar's vice president of network operations.
Northstar plans quarterly healthcare lane planning sessions beginning in August 2026.

proposed_account_objects.title: Regional fulfillment capacity expanded
proposed_account_objects.summary: Two new regional centers indicate active network expansion and added operating capacity.

proposed_account_objects.title: Network operations leader identified
proposed_account_objects.summary: Maya Chen is the named executive stakeholder for Northstar's network operations organization.

proposed_account_objects.title: Prepare for a healthcare lane planning session
proposed_account_objects.summary: Use Northstar's announced quarterly planning format to frame capacity and exception-trend questions.
